status: explicit corrected C1 remainder certificate on critical fixed-cutoff cells with L>=50; not corrected transversality, Lambda<=0, or RH
proof_boundary: This artifact proves the stated corrected normalized C1 remainder bounds on radius-1/L disks contained in one prescribed-N cell. It does not cover cutoff-crossing disks, prove the corrected-main first-jet lower bound, close lower frequencies, exclude a positive Newman boundary, prove Lambda<=0, or prove RH.

exact.region: L=log(x/(4*pi))>=50, 0<t<=1/2, 0<t*L<=25, rho=1/L, and the radius-rho disk stays in one prescribed-N cell
exact.collar_geometry: On |z-x|<=1/L: X=Re z satisfies L-1<=log(X/(4*pi))<=L+1 and 0<=|Im z|<=1/L
exact.normalized_split: Z_t=J_hat_(N,t)+r, where J_hat agrees on the real axis with the corrected main J=P-Q
exact.cell_target: T_L[J]>32000000*exp(-3L/2) excludes a double zero on a fixed-N cell
exact.transition_gap: Disks crossing a cutoff still require an adjacent-N corrected-lift comparison

rows.claim: The critical asymptotic cell region has a scale-adapted holomorphic collar.
rows.formula: L=log(x/(4*pi))>=50, 0<t<=1/2, 0<t*L<=25, rho=1/L, and the radius-rho disk stays in one prescribed-N cell; On |z-x|<=1/L: X=Re z satisfies L-1<=log(X/(4*pi))<=L+1 and 0<=|Im z|<=1/L
rows.proof_boundary: Fixed prescribed cutoff N throughout the disk.

rows.claim: The complete two-saddle Dirichlet coefficient mass has a uniform square-root cutoff bound.
rows.proof_boundary: Uses the published Re(s_*) and gamma/kappa estimates.

rows.claim: The published finite-sum approximation errors gain three quarters of the logarithmic height.
rows.proof_boundary: Uniform for bounded c=tL on the stated collar.

rows.claim: After extracting the endpoint term, the published contour error gains one saddle factor.
rows.proof_boundary: Uses the refined e_C, not the coarser e_C0.

rows.claim: The certified C0 strip bound makes the endpoint holomorphic-lift defect lower order on the collar.
rows.proof_boundary: Composes the exact lift defect equation with |C0|<5 and |C0'|<60.

rows.claim: The corrected fixed-cutoff approximation has one holomorphic scalar remainder bound.
rows.formula: sup_collar |B_t(z)|/A_t(x)<2; R_hat=H_t-(A_(t,N)+B_(t,N)-C_hat_(N,t)) is holomorphic and sup_collar |R_hat|/A_t(x)<2500*exp(-3L/4)

rows.claim: Cauchy's estimate and normalizer differentiation give an explicit corrected C1 remainder.
rows.formula: Z_t=J_hat_(N,t)+r, where J_hat agrees on the real axis with the corrected main J=P-Q; |r|<2500*exp(-3L/4), |r'|<5000*L*exp(-3L/4)

rows.claim: The exact double-zero exclusion target now has a fully explicit fixed-cell error side.
rows.formula: r^2+(r'/L)^2<32000000*exp(-3L/2); T_L[J]>32000000*exp(-3L/2) excludes a double zero on a fixed-N cell
rows.proof_boundary: The corrected-main lower bound remains open.

rows.claim: Cutoff-crossing Cauchy disks remain outside this fixed-cell certificate.
rows.formula: Disks crossing a cutoff still require an adjacent-N corrected-lift comparison

rows.claim: Closing the remainder side does not establish corrected finite transversality.
rows.formula: explicit error budget != T_L[J] lower bound
